library(rstan)

# Load data

  N = nrow(Data),
  y = Data$y,
  n = Data$n
)

# Compile and fit the model
fit <- sampling(
  file = "hierarchical_model.stan",
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 100000,
  seed = 1
)

# Extract posterior samples
posterior_samples <- extract(fit)

# Compute posterior means
posterior_alpha_mean <- mean(posterior_samples$alpha)
posterior_beta_mean <- mean(posterior_samples$beta)

# Save results to files
write(posterior_alpha_mean, file = "/app/posterior_alpha_mean.txt")
write(posterior_beta_mean, file = "/app/posterior_beta_mean.txt")

# Print results
print(paste("Posterior mean of alpha:", posterior_alpha_mean))

library(rstan)

# Load data
Data <- read.csv("/app/data.csv")

# Prepare data for Stan
stan_data <- list(
  N = nrow(Data),
  y = Data$y,
  n = Data$n
)

# Compile the model
model <- stan_model(file = "hierarchical_model.stan")

# Fit the model
fit <- sampling(
  object = model,
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 100000,
  seed = 1
)

# Extract posterior samples
posterior_samples <- extract(fit)

# Compute posterior means
posterior_alpha_mean <- mean(posterior_samples$alpha)
posterior_beta_mean <- mean(posterior_samples$beta)

# Save results to files
write(posterior_alpha_mean, file = "/app/posterior_alpha_mean.txt")
write(posterior_beta_mean, file = "/app/posterior_beta_mean.txt")

# Print results
print(paste("Posterior mean of alpha:", posterior_alpha_mean))
print(paste("Posterior mean of beta:", posterior_beta_mean))
